title: Legends  SMP modpack
description: A modpack for the legends smp! Has all the dependencies for the Legends SMP.
body:
This is the official modpack for the Legends SMP. Contains all the dependencies for the Legends SMP and some preformance mods such as Sodium to not only enhance your gameplay, but to improve your preformance drastically. The purpose of this modpack is to allow the members of the Legends SMP play the server, but it can also be used to improve FPS and your experience.

<details>
<summary>Mods included</summary>

# Mods included:
- **Life Series (older versions only)**
- **Magic items**
- **Craftsman's bows**
- **Magic gems**
- **Alpha equiptment**
-  Fabric API
- Cloth Config API
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity culling
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- More Culling
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Sodium
- Sodium extra
- Text Placeholder API
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- Simple Voice Chat


</details>
